programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: A Colorado family's dream of self-sufficiency is crumbling under the destructiveness of their bison herd; to supply the ranch with food and water, the Raneys must first tame the chaos and build a path to true self-sustainability.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground; Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse; Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: The Raneys mark the milestone of 100 rescues with a look back at their most unforgettable homesteads. From wild transformations to fan-favorite families, they revisit it all, even answering viewers' most-asked social media questions.

programs.title: Truck Dynasty
programs.sub_title: It's a Boat. It's a Truck. It's BoatTruck
programs.desc: Due to a windfall from a custom project, Joe plans to create the Boat Truck, an amphibious Jeep; with a buyer for the Defender falling through, Pop, Jerry Jr. and Frank are tasked with finding buyers for both the Defender and the Boat Truck.
